```{r supp_fig5, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
    cell_col = "WT:WT Total Leukocytes",
    title = "WT:WT Total Leukocytes", y_lab = "CD45.2 Cells\n(Normalized to 0-Week)"
)
supp_fig5b
ggsave(paste0(figures_save_path, "SuppFigure5B_CD45_Isoforms.png"), supp_fig5b, width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```

# Supplementary Figure 6 - Platinum Treatment Expands Tp53 Mutant Cells
```{r supp_fig6, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, fig.width=15, fig.height=20}
supp_fig6a <- make_mouse_cell_plot(
    mouse_data[["SuppFigure 6"]] %>%
        mutate(Cohort = factor(Cohort, levels = c("Vehicle", "Cisplatin", "Talazoparib", "Olaparib"))),
    cell_col = "Granulocytes",
    title = "Granulocytes"
)
supp_fig6a <- add_significance_annotation(supp_fig6a, "***", 13.5, 2.05, 1.08)
ggsave(paste0(figures_save_path, "SuppFigure6A_Platinum_Treatment_Tp53_Mutant_Cells_Granulocytes.png"), supp_fig6a, width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)

supp_fig6b <- make_mouse_cell_plot(
    mouse_data[["SuppFigure 6"]] %>%
        mutate(Cohort = factor(Cohort, levels = c("Vehicle", "Cisplatin", "Talazoparib", "Olaparib"))),
    cell_col = "B_Cells",
    title = "B_Cells"
)
supp_fig6b <- add_significance_annotation(supp_fig6b, "***", 13.5, 1.89, 1.17)
ggsave(paste0(figures_save_path, "SuppFigure6B_Platinum_Treatment_Tp53_Mutant_Cells_BCells.png"), supp_fig6b, width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)

supp_fig6c <- make_mouse_cell_plot(
    mouse_data[["SuppFigure 6"]] %>%
        mutate(Cohort = factor(Cohort, levels = c("Vehicle", "Cisplatin", "Talazoparib", "Olaparib"))),
    cell_col = "Monocytes",
    title = "Monocytes",
    y_limits = c(0, 3.0),
    x_limits = as.character(0:14)
)
supp_fig6c <- add_significance_annotation(supp_fig6c, "****", 14, 2.08, 1.17)
supp_fig6c <- add_significance_annotation(supp_fig6c, "*", 13.5, 1.72, 1.17)
ggsave(paste0(figures_save_path, "SuppFigure6C_Platinum_Treatment_Tp53_Mutant_Cells_Monocytes.png"), supp_fig6c, width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)

supp_fig6 <- plot_grid(
  ggdraw() + annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5, label = "CD45.2 Cells (Normalized to 0-Week)", size = 8, angle = 90),
  plot_grid(supp_fig6a, supp_fig6b, supp_fig6c, ncol = 1),
  ncol = 2,
  rel_widths = c(0.5, 10),
  rel_heights = c(1, 1)
)
supp_fig6
ggsave(paste0(figures_save_path, "SuppFigure6_Platinum_Treatment_Tp53_Mutant_Cells.png"), supp_fig6, width = 15, height = 12, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```

# Supplementary Figure 7 - TP53-Mutants have Decreased Engraftment
```{r supp_fig7, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, fig.width=20, fig.height=15}
supp_fig7 <- mouse_data[["SuppFigure 7A"]] %>%
    group_by(Cohort, Week) %>%
    summarise(mean_value = mean(CD45.2_Cells), sd_value = sd(CD45.2_Cells), sem_value = sd(CD45.2_Cells, na.rm = TRUE)/sqrt(n())) %>%
    ggplot(
        aes(
        x = factor(Week),
        y = mean_value,
        fill = Cohort,
        color = Cohort,
        group = Cohort
        )
    ) +
    geom_point(size = 6) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_errorbar(
        aes(
            ymin = mean_value - sem_value,
            ymax = mean_value + sem_value
        ),
        width = 0.5
    ) +
    labs(
        x = "Weeks Post-Transplant",
        y = expression("%"~Trp53^"R172H/+"~Cells),
        fill = "Cohort",
        title = "Leukocyte Chimerism"
    ) +
    panel_theme_basic +
    scale_fill_nejm() +
    scale_color_nejm() +
    theme(
        plot.margin = margin(1, 1, 1, 1, "cm"),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
    ) +
    ylim(NA, 50) +
    scale_x_discrete(limits = as.character(0:17), expand = c(0, 0.5), breaks = c(0, 4, 8, 12, 16))
supp_fig7
ggsave(paste0(figures_save_path, "SuppFigure7_TP53_Mutants_Decreased_Engraftment.png"), supp_fig7, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```

# Supplementary Figure 8 - Mutant TP53 Cells fail to expand
```{r supp_fig, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, fig.width=15, fig.height=20}
supp_fig8a <- make_mouse_cell_plot(
    mouse_data[["SuppFigure 8"]] %>%
        mutate(
            Cohort = case_when(
                Cohort == "BRCA1 Vehicle" ~ "BRCA1 fl/+ Vehicle",
                Cohort == "BRCA1 Cisplatin" ~ "BRCA1 fl/+ Cisplatin",
                Cohort == "BRCA1 Talazoparib" ~ "BRCA1 fl/+ Talazoparib"
            ),
            Cohort = factor(Cohort, levels = c("BRCA1 fl/+ Vehicle", "BRCA1 fl/+ Cisplatin", "BRCA1 fl/+ Talazoparib"))
        ),
    cell_col = "Granulocytes",
    title = "Granulocytes"
)
ggsave(paste0(figures_save_path, "SuppFigure8A_Granulocytes.png"), supp_fig8a, width = 12, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)

supp_fig8b <- make_mouse_cell_plot(
    mouse_data[["SuppFigure 8"]] %>%
        mutate(
            Cohort = case_when(
                Cohort == "BRCA1 Vehicle" ~ "BRCA1 fl/+ Vehicle",
                Cohort == "BRCA1 Cisplatin" ~ "BRCA1 fl/+ Cisplatin",
                Cohort == "BRCA1 Talazoparib" ~ "BRCA1 fl/+ Talazoparib"
            ),
            Cohort = factor(Cohort, levels = c("BRCA1 fl/+ Vehicle", "BRCA1 fl/+ Cisplatin", "BRCA1 fl/+ Talazoparib"))
        ),
    cell_col = "B_Cells",
    title = "B Cells"
)
ggsave(paste0(figures_save_path, "SuppFigure8B_BCells.png"), supp_fig8b, width = 12, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)

supp_fig8c <- make_mouse_cell_plot(
    mouse_data[["SuppFigure 8"]] %>%
        mutate(
            Cohort = case_when(
                Cohort == "BRCA1 Vehicle" ~ "BRCA1 fl/+ Vehicle",
                Cohort == "BRCA1 Cisplatin" ~ "BRCA1 fl/+ Cisplatin",
                Cohort == "BRCA1 Talazoparib" ~ "BRCA1 fl/+ Talazoparib"
            ),
            Cohort = factor(Cohort, levels = c("BRCA1 fl/+ Vehicle", "BRCA1 fl/+ Cisplatin", "BRCA1 fl/+ Talazoparib"))
        ),
    cell_col = "Monocytes",
    title = "Monocytes",
    y_limits = c(0, 8.5)
)
ggsave(paste0(figures_save_path, "SuppFigure8C_Monocytes.png"), supp_fig8c, width = 12, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```

# Supplementary Figure 9 - No Rescue
```{r supp_fig9, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, fig.width=15, fig.height=20}
df_to_plot <- timepoints %>%
  filter(growth_rate_sensitivity != Inf & growth_rate_sensitivity != -Inf) %>%
  filter(Gene_Class == "DDR" | Gene_Class == "DTA")

model_growth_rate_gene_class_sensitivity <- rbind(
    glm(
        formula = growth_rate_sensitivity ~ Cohort + AGE + RACE,
        data = df_to_plot %>% filter(Gene_Class == "DDR")
    ) %>%
        sjPlot::get_model_data(type = "est") %>%
        filter(grepl("Cohort", term)),
    glm(
        formula = growth_rate_sensitivity ~ Cohort + AGE + RACE,
        data = df_to_plot %>% filter(Gene_Class == "DDR") %>%
            filter(Cohort != "No Treatment") %>%
            mutate(Cohort = factor(Cohort, levels = c("Carboplatin", "PARPi")))
    ) %>%
        sjPlot::get_model_data(type = "est") %>%
        filter(grepl("Cohort", term)) %>%
        mutate(term = "CarboplatinPARPi")
)

counts <- df_to_plot %>%
    group_by(Cohort, Gene_Class) %>%
    summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop")

supp_fig9 <- df_to_plot %>%
    ggplot(
        aes(
            x = Gene_Class,
            y = growth_rate_sensitivity,
            fill = Cohort 
        )
    ) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
    geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width=0.2), alpha = 0.2, color = "black") +
    geom_text(data = counts, aes(label = n, y = 0.04), size = 8, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black", alpha = 0.3) +
    labs(
        x = "",
        y = "Growth Rate",
        fill = "Cohort"
    ) +
    panel_theme_basic +
    scale_fill_nejm() + 
    theme(plot.margin = margin(1, 0, 0, 1, "cm")) +
    scale_y_continuous(trans = scales::pseudo_log_trans(0.001), breaks = c(-0.05, -0.01, -0.005, 0, 0.005, 0.01, 0.05), limit = c(NA, 1.5)) +
    do.call(geom_signif, default_sig(5.0, 0.75, 1, model_growth_rate_gene_class_sensitivity$p.value[1], model_growth_rate_gene_class_sensitivity$p.stars[1], show_values = FALSE)) +
    do.call(geom_signif, default_sig(5.6, 0.75, 1.25, model_growth_rate_gene_class_sensitivity$p.value[2], model_growth_rate_gene_class_sensitivity$p.stars[2], show_values = FALSE)) +
    do.call(geom_signif, default_sig(6.4, 1, 1.25, model_growth_rate_gene_class_sensitivity$p.value[3], model_growth_rate_gene_class_sensitivity$p.stars[3], show_values = FALSE))
supp_fig9
ggsave(paste0(figures_save_path, "SuppFigure9_No_Rescue_GrowthRate_Sensitivity.png"), supp_fig9, width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```

# Supplementary Table 1 - MSK Demographics
```{r msk_table}
label(msk_df$age) <- "Age at Treatment Start"
label(msk_df$race) <- "Race"
label(msk_df$SystemTumorType) <- "Cancer Diagnosis"
label(msk_df$smoke_bin) <- "Smoking Status"

table1(~ age + Gender + race + smoke_bin + SystemTumorType | Treatment, data = msk_df)
```

# Supplementary Table 2 - MSK Clonal Hematopoiesis
```{r msk_clinical, echo=FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
label(msk_df$ch_pancan_pd_bin) <- "Clonal Hematopoiesis"
label(msk_df$mutnum_pancan_pd) <- "Number of Mutations"
label(msk_df$VAF_pancan_pd) <- "Maximum VAF"

table1(
  ~ ch_pancan_pd_bin + VAF_pancan_pd + mutnum_pancan_pd | Treatment, 
  data = msk_df
)
```

# Supplementary Table 3 - Carboplatin and PARPi Demographics
```{r carbo_parp_table, echo=FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
label(table_demographics$AGE) <- "Age at Treatment Start"
label(table_demographics$HRD) <- "Germline Genetic Testing"
label(table_demographics$CANCER.DX) <- "Cancer Diagnosis"
label(table_demographics$RACE) <- "Race"
label(table_demographics$SEX) <- "Sex"

table1(~ AGE + SEX + RACE + Smoking + Drug + CANCER.DX + HRD | Cohort, data = table_demographics %>% mutate(Cohort = factor(Cohort, levels = c("Untreated", "Carboplatin", "PARPi"))))
```

# Supplementary Table 4 - Longitudinal CH Mutations
```{r ch_mutation_table, echo=FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
test_timepoints %>% 
    select(key, Gene) %>% 
    mutate(Gene = factor(Gene, levels = gene_list)) %>%
    distinct() %>%
    arrange(Gene) %>%
    fwrite(paste0(figures_save_path, "SuppTable4_Longitudinal_CH_Mutations.csv"))
```

# Supplementary Table 5 - MoChA Demographics
```{r mocha_table, echo=FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
label(mocha_demographics$AGE) <- "Age at Treatment Start"
label(mocha_demographics$Sex_Reported) <- "Sex"
label(mocha_demographics$Ancestry) <- "Race"

# Certain DeIDs are in both Carboplatin and PARPi cohorts, so we need to assign 
# them to one or the other based on their earliest AGE at treatment start
multi_cohort_deid_map <- c(
  "1108236" = "PARPi",
  "1536848" = "Carboplatin",
  "1537527" = "PARPi",
  "1592606" = "Carboplatin",
  "1592759" = "PARPi",
  "1620504" = "Carboplatin",
  "1734282" = "Carboplatin",
  "1755649" = "Carboplatin",
  "1782310" = "PARPi"
)

table1(
 ~ AGE + Sex_Reported + Ancestry | Cohort, 
 data = mocha_demographics %>%
      arrange(AGE) %>%                        # We assume the earliest AGE is the FIRST sample
      mutate(Cohort = dplyr::coalesce(multi_cohort_deid_map[as.character(DeID)], Cohort)) %>%
      distinct(DeID, Cohort, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
      filter(Cohort != "")
)
```
